name: Guillaume H.
text: I've had the pleasure of being Danilo's PHP teacher and of supervising his final project at Maisonneuve. He's a fast learner, a very detail-oriented person and a highly motivated worker. Hire him!

name: Camille Breau
text: I had the opportunity to collaborate with Danilo, he is someone who listens deeply and genuinely values dialogue and teamwork. Rigorous, organized, and attentive to detail, he demonstrates great care both in the structure of his code and in the visual design of his interfaces.Beyond his technical skills, Danilo is an honest and caring person with a remarkable sense of responsibility. I sincerely hope he finds an environment where he can fully thrive and continue to grow.

name: Simon C-B
text: Danilo s’est distingué par son attitude ouverte et positive tout au long de sa formation. Réceptif à la rétroaction, il a démontré une volonté constante de s’améliorer et d’approfondir ses compétences. Sa détermination se traduit par un engagement soutenu et une grande rigueur dans la réalisation de ses projets, qui se sont révélés d’une qualité remarquable.

name: Marcos Oliveira
text: I had the pleasure of working with Danilo during his internship at Riopel Consultant. He completed all the tasks assigned to him to a very satisfactory standard. Danilo demonstrated strong coding skills and consistently delivered clean, well-structured code. He is a dedicated professional, eager to learn, and showed great responsibility throughout his work.
